Import Libraries
text:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
name: Import Sklearn

text: df = pd.read_csv('')
name: Load CSV
Head Info
text:
print(df.head())
print(df.shape)
print(df.info())
print(df.describe())

name: Null Check
text: df.isnull().sum()

name: Duplicates
text: df.duplicated().sum()
df.dtypes
name: Data Types

text: df[''].value_counts()
name: Value Counts

text: df.dropna(inplace=True)
name: Drop Nulls
Fill Nulls
text: df[''].fillna(df[''].mean(), inplace=True)

name: Rename Columns
text: df.rename(columns={'old':'new'}, inplace=True)

name: Reset Index
text: df.reset_index(drop=True, inplace=True)
df.groupby('')[''].sum()
name: Group By
Sort Values
text: df.sort_values('', ascending=False)
df.corr()
name: Correlation
Plot
text:
plt.figure(figsize=(10,6))
plt.title('')
plt.show()

name: Histogram
text:
df[''].hist(bins=30)
plt.show()

name: Heatmap
text:
sns.heatmap(df.corr(), annot=True, cmap='coolwarm')
plt.show()

name: Save CSV
text: df.to_csv('output.csv', index=False)
